root_cause: Container runtime restart on the node disrupted the pod after recovery
evidence: Node runtime outage signal was observed before recovery on node node1
Node Ready condition is currently True (reason=KubeletReady), indicating the node recovered after the runtime interruption
Pod disruption happened after the runtime recovered rather than during a still-active outage
Pod restartCount increased to 4 after the disruption

causes.message: Timeline shows the node container runtime became unavailable before pod disruption
The node container runtime restarted or recovered and destabilized the affected pod
After runtime recovery, kubelet had to recreate or restart pod workload state
The pod remains unhealthy because runtime restart fallout interrupted its execution state

node:node1: Runtime outage was followed by node recovery before pod disruption
pod:payments-api-5fd79b6d76-m2x8q: Pod was disrupted after the node container runtime restarted or recovered
Pod sandbox changed, it will be killed and re-created.
